title: clinopodium nervosum
intro: Clinopodium nervosum, also known as nervous marjoram, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium nervosum include relief from headaches, digestive problems, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. Clinopodium nervosum can be prepared for consumption as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
